W.A.V.E.S.

Whispers Across Vast Ebon Seas

The tide is rising. The fog is boiling.

Build. Gather. Defend the Hall.

Don't let the Dread set in.

Controls

  • WASD Move
  • Q Ranged Attack
  • E Interact / Reinforce
  • B Build Mode
  • 1-8 Select Structure
  • F Follow Me
  • G Assign Task
  • H Halt All (Stop Tasks)
  • R Rally / Unman Tower
  • M Mute Audio
  • ESC Cancel / Close

Guide

Low Tide: Gather resources, build defenses, and manage villagers.

High Tide: Defend the Great Hall from the waves.

Reinforce: Stand near a wall/tower and hold [E] to buff it (Costs 2 Wood).

Dread: Keep it low, or face the consequences.

W.A.V.E.S.

Whispers Across Vast Ebon Seas
